---
title: Dr Pawel Orzechowski
subtitle: |
  Lecturer in Programming for Data Science
description: |
  Programmer who fell in love with teaching.
image: pawel_profile.jpg
image-alt: |
  Photo of Pawel
format:
  html: 
    css: ddi-styles.css
---

::: {.profile-image-float-left}
![](pawel_profile.jpg){fig-align="centre"}
:::

## Background

I'm a programmer who fell in love with teaching. I believe that coding is a social and creating activity. I've taught programming for over a decade in coding bootcamps, business and medical departments. Currently working on up-skilling medical and care staff, and widening access to coding skills. My courses [introduce](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxhein11045.htm) and [expand on](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxhein11062.htm) Software Development Practices (in Python) and [Text Analysis (NLP) in R](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxhein11093.htm). I also build teaching and marking tools and am on the leadership team of the book [Teaching Programming across Disiplines](https://pairprogramming.ed.ac.uk/category/book/).

## Experience

**- 2024- Now  - Lecturer at the Edinburgh Medical School, University of Edinburgh.** Teaching Software Development, Python, Text Analytics (NLP), Data Visualisation.

**- 2019-2023 - Lecturer at the Business School, University of Edinburgh.** Teaching Software Development, Python, Web Analytics.

**- 2017-2019 - Senior Instructor, Codeclan: Scotland's own Software Bootcamp.** Teaching Ruby, Python, Java, Javascript, SQL. Also running Client eXperience (CX) internships program.

**- 2013-2017 - Software Developer, Head of Mobile** Storm Ideas and Welbot.io. Building web and mobile games and apps for TV companies. 

**- 2009-2015 PhD in Computer Science and UX from Heriot-Watt University.** "Pinching sweaters on your phone – iShoogle : multi-gesture touchscreen fabric simulator using natural on-fabric gestures to communicate textile qualities" [printed Book](https://www.amazon.co.uk/iShoogle-Touching-Feeling-Fabrics-Touchscreen/dp/1326642197) or [pdf download](https://www.ros.hw.ac.uk/items/5ad905fd-d97e-4006-8f37-ea7e2e3c7ea6)  

## Courses for UG and PGT

**Edinburgh Medical School (previously Usher Institute):**

- 2022-now - [Introduction to software development in Health and Social Care (HEIN11045)](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxhein11045.htm)
- 2023-now - [Applied Software Development in Health and Social Care (HEIN11062)](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxhein11062.htm)
- 2024-now - [Natural Language Processing (NLP) in Health and Social Care (HEIN11085) Online](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/25-26/dpt/cxhein11085.htm) and  [On Campus](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/25-26/dpt/cxhein11093.htm)

**Edinburgh Futures Institute:**

- 2020-now [Text Mining for Social Research - Fusion Online EFIE11005](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxefie11005.htm) and [Fusion On Campus EFIE11006](https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxefie11006.htm)

**Short Courses Platform:**

- [NLP in R for Health and Social Care](https://shortcourses.ed.ac.uk/course/natural-language-processing-nlp-1-in-r-for-health-and-social-care)

**Business School**

- 2019-2023 - Undergraduate Course: Fundamentals of Programming for Business Applications (BUST08039)
- 2019-2023 - Postgraduate Course: Python Programming (CMSE11433)
- 2019-2023 - Postgraduate Course: Web and Social Network Analytics (CMSE11427)

<!--
## Continuing Professional Development

-   TODO

## Publications

-   TODO
-->

## Outside of work

- Pawel is a co-organiser of  [codebar Edinburgh](https://codebar.io/edinburgh) - a monthly code mentoring event for groups underrepresented in tech industry. 

## Contact details

📧 [Pawel.Orzechowski@ed.ac.uk](mailto:Pawel.Orzechowski@ed.ac.uk)

🔗 [LinkedIn Page](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dr-pawel-orzechowski/)
